name: @forwardimpact/libpack
description: Pack distribution — tarballs, bare git repos, and skill discovery indices
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Needing engineers to install skill packs and realizing each ecosystem expects a different artifact format.
jobs.bigHire: distribute skill packs so agents and engineers can install them through their preferred tool.
jobs.littleHire: add a distribution format without reimplementing the staging and orchestration loop.
jobs.competesWith: inlining pack logic in each product command; hand-rolling tar and git plumbing per consumer; maintaining parallel format-specific scripts
